item.title: First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.
item.description: First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.
item.guid: 2026-02-04/First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.

item.title: 👍Helen Torris - Advocacy Chair for the American Society of Interior Designers, WA chapter
item.description: Helen Torris signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Advocacy Chair for the American Society of Interior Designers, WA chapter.

item.title: 👍Brooke Hammond - Advocacy Chair for the American Society of Interior Designers, WA chapter
item.description: Brooke Hammond signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: ❓Clarissa Easton - American Institute of Architects Washington Council
item.description: Clarissa Easton signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent American Institute of Architects Washington Council.

item.title: 👍Megan Onley - Interenational Interior Design Association - Northern Pacific Chapter
item.description: Megan Onley signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Interenational Interior Design Association - Northern Pacific Chapter.

item.title: 👍💵Michael Transue - Interenational Interior Design Association - Northern Pacific Chapter
item.description: Michael Transue signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Interenational Interior Design Association - Northern Pacific Chapter. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Stacey Crumbaker signed up to testify Pro.
